programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Hike: It's a lovely day and Pins want to go for a walk in the meadow and do some exploring. But Nettie is content to read under a shady tree
It's Time to Look for Clues: JoJo and Gran Gran must find the owner of a teddy found lying on the ground by Cynthia.
It's Time to Write a Book: JoJo and Gran Gran are at the library trying to find a new Captain Chloe book, but it seems that she's read them all.
Doireann the spider must find a new home after a storm, and with the help of her friends, she learns that the right place is one where she can feel safe and welcome.
The fairies work together to create a time capsule for the future, choosing special items that celebrate their adventures, friendships, and the magic of Fairy Island.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Galactic Gourmet: Zuzu is excited to cook up a Groobling banquet for her friends but Adam does not like trying new food.
Chairing is Caring: When Speedy needs repairs, Adam uses a hover chair that's so awesome. Speedy fears she may lose her bestie forever.
Doodle Girl and Pencil dive into a Mega Doodle Maze full of twists, turns, and confused adventurers in need of help!
Booferroo: The Mixmups go on an adventure to find a helper pet for Spin but the chosen pet keeps hiding. Will the Mixmups find another way to make the Booferoo come out and play?
Sweetwood's Snow Day: When Zigzag refuses to wear mittens, it's up to Vida to convince her before she gets too cold.
Sweetwood's Slippery Day: When her patients fall on slippery ice, Vida fixes their booboos AND their icy issue.
Space Out: An odd shooting star lands behind the Dream Factory as the kids observe a meteor shower. Curious, the kids decide to investigate the next morning.
Rocking the Boat: Drew and Jonathan decide to recreate a special dinner from their parents' past, using the Dream Factory, but things don't go as perfectly as they plan.
Blaze-tackling antics with the friendly firefighter from Pontypandy
When Peter creates a wild and adventurous trail for Scoop Dooley to follow, they both end up getting lost.
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Crab Crossing: While repairing a sea wall near Norramby Beach, Sandy and Carly accidentally cut off a consortium of crabs - they get stuck on the wrong side of the wall, away from the ocean!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Driving Winston: With Emily taking on the full-time role of Sodor's Safety Engine, Sir Topham Hatt needs a new guiding vehicle.
Andy And The Chipmunk: When park boss Mr Hammond accidentally breaks some acorns in the Jungle Den, it's up to Andy to jet off in his safari-mobile to Canada and collect some more.
Con and Michael show Punky how to high five. They say it's cool.
Tá Hugo agus Sonia ag imirt cluiche na scáthanna ach tá an ghrian ag dul faoi. An mbeidh deireadh leis an gcluiche?
Tá Sonia agus Hugo ag tabhairt cúnamh do Mhama sa ghairdín.
Salty is getting ready for lunch with Hatsie and splashes on some of his old Honking Haddock aftershave; when Lily tries to explain that he smells terrible, he refuses to listen.
Lily finds a paintbrush washed up on the beach.
Is lá breá gréine eile é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá. Tá Mya Go ag teaghlach ag dul a shiúl ar feadh na canála. Féach, bád, is tá simléir air. Is níochán - tá sé cosúil le teach.
Is lá breá gréine eile é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá... agus tá Mya Go ar cuairt chuig Mamó agus Daideo Go.
Is tráthnóna breá é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá, is tá Mya Go agus Dada Go réidh leis an siopadóireacht tigh Sally Siopa.
The sisters try to figure out who made tracks in the snow.
The sisters go exploring to find out what made the big noise in the forest.
Kiva and Saul find yeti prints in the sand. Together with Angus they must find a clever way to find him.
The Wee Littles find themselves lost in the long grass; how will they get home?

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: When the parents clear some space in the attic, some siblings vie for their own private bedroom in an epic play-battle saga based on Cheese's mediaeval fantasy story.
Lucy & Ella have prepared a special surprise for Blaze but when he opens the box, his little sister bursts out and startles him.
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)

programmes.show_description: Moon Shape: Explorers Hannah, Oliver and Reiann visit Nina in her workshop and discover that light from the sun only shines on one side of the moon.

Cigil: Imríonn MeMo agus BaBa tóir chigilte le cleite Éinín. Ag Am Spraoi, roghnaíonn siad cleití dustála don tsúgradh, nó i bhfocail eile slat chigilte.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Painting: Pins and Nettie are happily painting pictures. Pins' picture of him and Nettie is absolutely amazing
It's Time to be Nature Detectives: JoJo and Gran Gran look for animals that are hard to spot as they join Cynthia and the Nature Club at the park.
It's Time to Go Stargazing: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a sleepover. JoJo loves her Captain Chloe dot to dot of the night sky and the treasure chest constellation that she's found.
The fairies are double-booked! With chicks and hedgehogs to babysit, they team up to help - and learn the importance of checking plans with friends and family.
A stormy day in the Fairy Tree turns into fun when the friends make music from nature's sounds - helping them see storms in a whole new, magical way.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Micro Mission: When a malfunction shrinks Adam and the gang to microscopic size, they must hitch a chaotic ride on Bubby's back to reach the microscope before Shelby sweeps them into oblivion.
Small and Mite-y: The crew gets an emergency distress call.
With Pencil on a break, Doodle Girl and Birdie put on a puppet show to keep themselves entertained.
Back to Front Band: The Mixmups mix up a Rock Star adventure to be in a band, but when Spin gets stage fright, will they find another way to help Spin perform.
Vida's Tiny Trip: Vida's usually the vet, but when she twists an ankle, she's the patient and all of Sweetwood helps!
Sweetwood's Sneezy Day: Vida's patients aren't sick, but they can't stop sneezing! Can she figure out why?
Mother's Day Brunch: The Crew is in the Dream Factory for Mother's Day, building special gifts for their Mums. Drew and Jonathan work on a Waffle-ator that makes delicious waffles automat.
Dream Factory Lock-In: Drew, Jonathan, Mel and Ayana have to find a clever way to unlock the Dream Factory after Biff accidentally locks himself in.
When James tries to win the star globe in a star spotter competition, he ends up breaking the globe and falls into the water chasing it
Hannah starts a scarecrow business, but there is one brave little bird that just isn't scared of her scarecrows.
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Joe & Ozzy have some deliveries for a surprise Birthday Party. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Slowest Race In The World: When Thomas, Kana, and Diesel 'race' to see who can go the slowest, their lack of speed provides lots of challenges.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Brunos Blustery Day: It's a whistling windy day on the island of Sodor and Bruno has prepped himself for the blustery day.
Andy And The Meerkats: The meerkats escape from Safari World and it's up to Andy to record a meerkat alarm call that will bring them running home.
The animated adventures of a girl with Down's syndrome who lives in the moment and works to solve problems encountered by her friends and family.
Foghlaimíonn Hugo agus Sonia go ndéanann Jimín, an gadhar, cumarsáid ar bhealach difriúil.
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Hugo agus Sonia ag fáil úsáidí nua do rudaí atá briste.
Lily puts her newly discovered set of measuring spoons to good use when Nonna takes a tumble and needs a rest, leaving Salty to step in and cook an important pudding.
Lily finds a whisk and takes it to Nonna's baking class. However, Nonna proves to be a tricky teacher.
Lá breá géine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá Agus tá Mya, Sammy agus Gaidhrín Go i dteach Mamo Gó agus Daideó Go.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure and shouts catchphrases such as Mya Go! and Maya Play!.
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá... Is tá rang Mya tar éis teacht ar cuairt chuig an Músaem.
A tin can inspired Norma to create a make-shift telephone, so that she can speak to Oliver.
The sisters discover the animals dance after every rain shower.
When something sharp punctures a tyre, Kiva, Saul and Angus go on an adventure VERY far way and find a clever way to help a robot in distress.
The Wee Littles make a Daddy long legs suit to help them pick apples for Teensys famous apple tart.
Hedgie Painting: Pins and Nettie are happily painting pictures. Pins' picture of him and Nettie is absolutely amazing
Henry meets a pan.

Dream Factory Lock-In: Drew, Jonathan, Mel and Ayana have to find a clever way to unlock the Dream Factory after Biff accidentally locks himself in.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: When the kids convince Mom and Dad to take part in a family friendly TV game show, they unwittingly kickstart an over-the-top rivalry between the two and threaten family peace.
Lucy is teaching Mr Fluffypants about trees which gives Ella and Blaze the idea of visiting the amazing Amazon rain forest in their Imagination Machine.

Memo-Madadh: Déanann BaBa cairdeas le héinín, BaBa-Éinín. Tá éinín mar chara ó MeMo fosta, mar sin ag Am Spraoi déanann sé cairdeas le bréagán úr, MeMo-Madadh.
